minting_now.name: Stop Doing This
minting_now.description:
# STOP DOING THIS

*A decentralized reaction system for the modern internet.*

Mint this NFT when you are tired of low-effort digital noise.

* Pixel collections
* Bot-driven engagement
* Empty hype cycles
* Recycled ideas dressed as innovation

But don’t just mint it.

Send it to the one who should

minting_now.name: Arcane Whispers
minting_now.description:
走进“奥法低语”（Arcane Whispers）的暗影世界——这是一个独特且充满神秘色彩的 NFT 交易卡牌系列，带您探寻远古传说中那些被遗忘的角落。该系列以一个隐秘教团为主角，成员涵盖了守护者、法师与探求者，他们毕生致力于掌控晦涩魔法并守护远古秘密。

每一枚“奥法低语” NFT 都是一件数字遗物，持有它即可获得一款正在开发中的策略性奥法卡牌游戏的参与资格。这些卡牌不仅承载着精美的艺术设计，更拥有植根于隐秘学、密码学及被遗忘仪式的隐藏属性与技能。持有者将解锁专属特权，包括 Pre-Alpha 测试资格、早期游戏背景故事，以及侧重于解密挑战和解锁游戏生态内隐藏奖励的社区活动。

minting_now.name: Sepin Artsy
minting_now.description: I started my Bitcoin art journey in 2020 with Sepim Art, inspired by the rise of Ordinals and the creativity emerging on Bitcoin. That experience shaped my path as a collector and deepened my appreciation for digital art culture.

minting_now.name: Farryfaces

minting_now.name: Sat0Formula

2300 NFTs. 2300 curve positions. One degen math cult.

Creator fees received by the collection will be used transparently to support SATO/ETH liquidity.

No promises. No guarantees. Just formula, memes, and

minting_now.name: Minute Dial
minting_now.description:
**1440 wall-clock minutes. UTC+1. Three days.**

Each minute is mintable only during the actual wall-clock minute it represents. The first wallet to mint claims the unique slot. Subsequent mints during the same minute become serialized TAKEN editions: #1, #2, #3.

Some minutes will never be claimed.

minting_now.name: DRAWLINGS

But over time, the drawings evolved, becoming something alive. Welcome to DRAWLINGS  a collection of 9,999 unique NFT creatures.

news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday. Thanks for bringing me into the mobile beta. Today, while out fishing on my boat, I was casually checking some of my assets. Been watching OpenSea evolve for years now… slowly turning into the Edge of Web3. MEGATIO MINT ANNOUNCEMENT  We’ve been cooking this up for a while, building, growing the community, and putting everything together...

had the pleasure to witness masterclass yesterday in miami with a vibrant room of NFT's greatest leaders safe to say i'm bullish & optimistic on the future of NFTs special shoutout to for his inputs yesterday, remains a staple for crypto Luca Netz

We're hosting an NFT founders meet up for Consensus Miami. If you're going to be in Miami for Consensus and work in NFTs you are invited (limited spots available). There's still some problems we need to fix, & I hope to see most of the NFT leaders there. forms.gle/cfXGV51rVVxQvF Secured my spot on the Just realized there’s a cool new feature on the mobile app where it gives you insight on whether ...

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena access to your funds...
